title: Monthly Revenue
description: Calculate total revenue for each month based on order date.
sql_solution: SELECT substr(date,1,7) month, SUM(amount) total FROM orders GROUP BY month;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

monthly_orders = orders.withColumn("month", date_format(to_date(col("date")), "yyyy-MM"))

result = monthly_orders.groupBy("month").agg(sum("amount").alias("total"))
